name: Chocolate Streusel Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine flour, powdered sugar, and cocoa powder. Cut in the cold butter until crumbly (the mixture will be dry).
3. Transfer 2 cups of the crumb mixture to another container. Press the remaining mixture firmly onto the bottom of a 13x9-inch baking pan.
4. Bake for 15 minutes.
5. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy. Gradually beat in the sweetened condensed milk until smooth. Add the egg and vanilla; mix well.
6. Pour the cream cheese mixture over the prepared crust.
7. Combine the chopped nuts with the reserved crumb mixture. Sprinkle over the cheese mixture.
8. Bake for an additional 25 minutes or until bubbly. Allow to cool, then chill before cutting into bars. Store covered in the refrigerator.
